chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-579 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 4934/2023 2.For orders on office objection. 3.For orders on MA 4935/2023 4.For hearing of Bail Application 28-08-2023 M/s Qurban Ali Malano and Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocates along with applicant. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Applicant Noor Muhammad Jalbani seeks protective bail in Crime No.166 of 2023, registered at Police Station, Mirpur Mathelo, for offence under Sections 302, 148 & 149 PPC. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case by the police; that the applicant is ready to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his imminent arrest at the hands of police. Hence, he seeks protection of law. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for period of Seven days is granted to the applicant subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Fifty Thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of aforesaid period or the date when the applicant surrenders before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. It is made clear that if the applicant failed to surrender before the trial Court in seven days, his bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application along with listed application(s) is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
